decision_point: In an adult with biopsy-proven localized high-grade osteosarcoma, is neoadjuvant chemotherapy plus wide resection or limb salvage or nonoperative management preferred?
clinical_vignette:
Typical adult patient for whom this decision arises (no atypical comorbidities or contraindications).

Decision: In an adult with biopsy-proven localized high-grade osteosarcoma, is neoadjuvant chemotherapy plus wide resection or limb salvage or nonoperative management preferred?
Options:
  1. Chemotherapy plus wide resection
  2. Nonoperative management
label: settled
label_rationale: Surgical resection is integral to curative-intent treatment.
